name: ccaas-admin-ui
description: Admin UI for Government CCaaS in a Box configuration

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w packages/api archiver @types/archiver
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w packages/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/ui && npm run lint -w packages/api
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/ui && npm run test -w packages/api

author: Maximus Federal Services, LLC
